examples: With a set of buttons and a loud bell, the device, sold by National Cash Register (NCR), was little more than a simple adding machine.
Before joining H.P. as its chief executivein 2005, Mr. Hurd was chief executive of NCR, which had the leading datawarehousing technology.
"NCR was a broken company, " recalls Lars Nyberg , the company's Swedish-born chief executive.
With everyone reaching for NCR's bigger customers, Nyberg is working hard to serve smaller ones.
